sn1.5:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.5:1.0.2: v.7"How many must one cut, how many abandon,And how many further must one develop?When a bhikkhu has surmounted how many tiesIs he called a crosser of the flood?"
sn1.5:1.0.3: v.8"One must cut off five, abandon five,And must develop a further five.A bhikkhu who has surmounted five tiesIs called a crosser of the flood."
